channel.title: THE IDOLM@STER on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in THE IDOLM@STER on yexca'Blog

item.title: IP Rules for THE IDOLM@STER MILLION LIVE!
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Recently, I couldn’t connect while playing Mirishita, so I looked for a solution. (Also testing a Spotify embed—this theme doesn’t support direct H5 parsing, and I’m too lazy to fix it.) Domain 1 theaterdays.appspot.com Originally, a Spotify song by Amayadori was embedded here. I’ve been loving Amayadori’s music lately and listening to them often. On Last.fm, “Nekokaburi” was my #1 track for the past 30 days. But the top …
